blended.narrative: Searchmont is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 39°F.
Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
